summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Live Territorial Control + Corner Intelligence feature. Backend implementation is fully functional with all 21 tests passing (100%). Fixed critical React Hooks violation in frontend component. Feature correctly implements 4-state territorial classification, corner pressure engine (always-run), and dynamic market ranking with CRITICAL RULE enforcement (no Over goals/BTTS/Next Goal when state=TERRITORIAL_CONTROL and strong_conversion=False).

fixed_issues.issue: React Hooks called conditionally after early return statements
fixed_issues.fix: Moved all hooks (useState, useRef, useEffect, useMemo) before conditional returns to comply with React Hooks rules

passed_tests: Backend: PSG canonical case (CORNER_PRESSURE_STATE) - state classification correct
Backend: PSG case - corner_pressure_state=True, controlling_team=PSG, losing_team=PSG
Backend: PSG case - strong_conversion=False (no goal markets recommended)
Backend: PSG case - corner score 69.2 >= 55 threshold
Backend: PSG case - top ranked market is 'Over córners PSG 3.5' (corners category)
Backend: PSG case - NO goal markets present (CRITICAL RULE enforced)
Backend: PSG case - evaluation_id persisted to db.live_territorial_evaluations
Backend: Control with pressure case - state=CONTROL_WITH_PRESSURE
Backend: Control with pressure case - strong_conversion=True
Backend: Control with pressure case - NEXT_GOAL market present in ranked list
Backend: NO_CLEAR_DOMINANCE case - state classification correct
Backend: API validation - 400 when no match_id and no metrics
Backend: API validation - 404 when match_id not found and no metrics
Backend: History endpoint - returns {ok:true, count, items}
Backend: History endpoint - items sorted by generated_at desc
Frontend: React Hooks violation fixed - component compiles successfully
Frontend: Sport gate working - panel does NOT render for non-football matches
Frontend: Live gate working - panel does NOT render for non-live matches
Frontend: Login flow working - demo@valuebet.app authenticated successfully
Frontend: Navigation working - can access match detail pages
Frontend: No console errors related to LiveTerritorialControlPanel

classify_territorial_state.psg_canonical: ✅ PASS - Returns CORNER_PRESSURE_STATE with correct controlling_team=PSG, losing_team=PSG
classify_territorial_state.no_clear_dominance: ✅ PASS - Returns NO_CLEAR_DOMINANCE when poss_gap<15 AND xg_gap<0.20 AND xt_gap<10

evaluate_corner_pressure.psg_case: ✅ PASS - Returns score=69.2 (>= 55 threshold), state=RISING_PRESSURE, surface_recommendation=True
evaluate_corner_pressure.market_candidates: ✅ PASS - Includes 'Over córners PSG 3.5', 'PSG más córners que el rival', 'Siguiente córner: PSG'

rank_live_markets.critical_rule_enforcement: ✅ PASS - When state=CORNER_PRESSURE_STATE and strong_conversion=False, NO goal markets (NEXT_GOAL/OVER_GOALS/BTTS) in ranked list
rank_live_markets.goal_markets_allowed: ✅ PASS - When state=CONTROL_WITH_PRESSURE and strong_conversion=True, goal markets ARE present
rank_live_markets.corners_priority: ✅ PASS - Corner markets ranked #1 when corner_pressure surfaces

POST /api/football/live/territorial_cont.happy_path: ✅ PASS - Returns {ok:true, evaluation_id, territorial, corner, ranked_markets}
POST /api/football/live/territorial_cont.validation_no_params: ✅ PASS - Returns 400 when neither match_id nor metrics provided
POST /api/football/live/territorial_cont.validation_not_found: ✅ PASS - Returns 404 when match_id not found and no metrics
POST /api/football/live/territorial_cont.persistence: ✅ PASS - Document created in db.live_territorial_evaluations with UUID id

GET /api/football/live/territorial_contr.sorting: ✅ PASS - Items sorted by generated_at desc

frontend_component.compilation: ✅ PASS - Fixed React Hooks violation, component compiles successfully
frontend_component.live_gate: ✅ PASS - Returns null when match.is_live !== true
frontend_component.rendering: ⚠️  CANNOT TEST - No live football matches available in database (0 live matches shown)
frontend_component.data_testid_attributes: ✅ PASS - All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing

notes: All backend pure functions working correctly with exact thresholds as specified
Corner engine ALWAYS returns score 0-100 even when corners=0
Market ranker correctly enforces CRITICAL RULE: no goal markets when only possession is high
Persistence layer working - evaluations stored in db.live_territorial_evaluations with UUID
Frontend component fixed - React Hooks violation resolved by moving all hooks before conditional returns
Frontend gates working correctly - panel only renders for live football matches
Cannot fully test UI rendering because no live football matches are currently available
Component structure follows best practices with data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
